datasets.name: Image dataset for quantification of virus-infected cells
datasets.notes: Hantavirus-infected cells stained against viral nucleocapsid protein. Use for infected-cell classification after label curation.

datasets.name: Data from: Seoul orthohantavirus evades innate immune activation by reservoir endothelial cells
datasets.notes: SEOV/HTNV endothelial-cell experiments; figure folders must be mapped into explicit labels before training.

referenceMedia.notes: HPS chest x-ray reference media, not a balanced training dataset.
Sin Nombre virus electron micrograph reference media.
